title: Backend API and data architecture
summary: Backend architecture v1 locks the modular monolith, PostgreSQL, REST, WeChat authentication, opaque sessions, role model, object storage boundary, Docker layout, API contracts, and gated delivery plan.
nextAction: 归档 backend-architecture-v1，并为 Phase 1 Foundation And Identity 创建新的 BUILD 线程。

evidence.summary: Backend architecture v1 contains the locked decisions and required design contracts.
00-main-control 已复核并接受后端架构 v1，模块、数据、鉴权、API、安全与分阶段门槛满足 BUILD 前置要求
